_comment: Energy Manager configuration. Fill in all REPLACE_ME values before first run.

foxess._charge_power_comment: Match this to 'Charge Power From Grid' in the FoxESS app. For 2x5kW batteries this is 10500W.

myenergi._comment: Generate your API key at myaccount.myenergi.com. WARNING: this replaces your myenergi app password.

dashboard._password_comment: Set a password to protect the dashboard when accessed via Cloudflare.

telegram._comment: Get bot_token from @BotFather. Get chat_id by messaging your bot then visiting https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates
telegram._notify_comment: Which events trigger a Telegram message. Set any to false to silence that notification.
